3.14.0.5.message: Fixed an issue where full-sync reconfigure rebuilt semantic vectorDB indexes even when the plugin configuration was unchanged.

3.13.0.0.message: Fixed an issue where a stacktrace error occurred during initialization and teardown.

3.12.0.0.message: Introduced the AI Semantic Response Guard plugin, enabling you to guard LLM responses against semantic content.
Fixed the deletion of guard instances and improved error handling.

3.12.0.1.message: Fixed an issue where a stacktrace error occurred during initialization and teardown.
